rationale.R1.4: The critique names one prior work (Wei et al., 2022) and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the critique marks confidence and missing evidence, such as the need to verify specific GSM8K seed-variance figures and re-check exact titles/years of cited prior works.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced; the critique identifies harmful patterns in the original, such as overclaiming novelty and using a strawman baseline set.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, such as adding external baselines, token-matched controls, and significance tests.
